steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage concludes that the general public regards attitudes/outlooks as an important benefit. The correct answer must show data that demonstrates how the general public itself ranked that service relative to others.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'discusses an unrelated service': The service referenced is not attitudes/outlooks, so it does not support the conclusion. ✗
  • Choice B — 'discusses another unrelated service': Same problem — wrong service, wrong data point. ✗
  • Choice C — 'compares two groups rather than showing one group's view': Makes a between-group comparison instead of demonstrating the general public's own prioritization. ✗
  • Choice D — 'attitudes/outlooks ranked 4th for the general public, above the other four services': Shows that the general public ranked this benefit higher than all others listed, directly supporting that they regard it as important. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
